name: All services Sales
query:
SELECT 
    S.posting_date AS "Date:Date:100", 
    S.ref_practitioner AS "Doctor:Data:200", 
    P.department AS "Department:Data:200",
    I.item_code AS "Service Name:Data:250", 
    I.description AS "Description:Data:250", 
    I.item_group AS "Item Group:Data:150",
    I.qty AS "Qty:Float:80", 
    ROUND(I.rate, 2) AS "Rate:Currency:100", 
    ROUND(I.net_amount, 2) AS "Net Rate:Currency:100",
    U.full_name AS "Owner Full Name:Data:200"  -- This line adds the owner's full name
FROM 
    `tabSales Invoice` S
JOIN 
    `tabSales Invoice Item` I ON S.name = I.parent
LEFT JOIN
    `tabHealthcare Practitioner` P ON S.ref_practitioner = P.name
LEFT JOIN
    `tabUser` U ON S.owner = U.name  -- Assuming the owner's ID is stored in the 'owner' field of Sales Invoice
WHERE 
    S.docstatus = 1
    #and I.item_code in ("FRAME")
    AND S.posting_date BETWEEN %(Start_date)s AND %(End_date)s;
